name: Mom's Cinnamon Rolls
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix yeast with warm water and sugar in a bowl; let sit for 10 minutes.
2. Add flour and beat well until smooth. Let rise for 30 minutes.
3. Beat eggs until frothy and fluffy, about 5 minutes.
4. Beat margarine and sugar together until very creamy.
5. Combine egg mixture with sponge mixture.
6. Gradually add the egg mixture to the sponge, adding salt.
7. Add additional egg mixture to the sponge; beat well.
8. Continue mixing flour until smooth but not sticky.
9. Knead dough on a floured surface until no longer sticky and easy to handle (about 10 minutes).
10. Place dough in a warm place covered with a damp cloth; let rise for 1 hour or until doubled.
11. Prepare baking pans by greasing them with margarine, then sprinkle brown sugar and butter evenly over the top.
12. Sprinkle very lightly with water to prevent burning.
13. Punch down dough and let rest for another half hour.
14. Divide dough in half; roll each portion into a rectangle about 1/2 inch thick.
15. Spread soft butter evenly over the dough, then sprinkle sugar and cinnamon.
16. Roll up each rectangle into a jelly roll style, stretching while rolling.
17. Cut rolls into 1-inch slices.
18. Place rolls on a baking sheet, touching but not overcrowded, let rise covered with damp cloth for about 30 minutes.
19. Bake at 325-350°F (165-175°C) for 20-25 minutes.
